.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.general_idea: Update the Java version used in the CI workflow from Java 8 to Java 11 to match the project migration.
.github/workflows/upload_release.yaml.why_exists: The project has been migrated to Java 11; using Java 8 will cause compilation failures or runtime incompatibilities with the new codebase.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 8 to Java 11 to align with the JDK migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 8 APIs and bytecode, failing to utilize Java 11 features or potentially causing runtime issues if Java 11-specific APIs are used in the codebase.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/config.general_idea: Add Sourceable dependency to AzureConfig constructor to support pluggable configuration sources.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/config.why_exists: Constructor signature change breaks existing instantiation calls that do not provide the new argument.
